summary: This document outlines a pilot proposal for KeepMeCompany's AI-driven communication platform aimed at NHS GP practices. It details the pilot objectives, resource commitments from staff, and projected ROI regarding time savings and QOF targets. Compliance standards such as Cyber Essentials and Class I Medical Device classification are also highlighted.
